title: Computer Architecture
description: CPU components, Von Neumann architecture, the fetch-decode-execute cycle, storage types, and performance factors.

title: Data Representation
description: Binary, denary, hexadecimal, data types, character encoding, graphics, sound, and compression.

title: Data & File Structures
description: Records, 1D and 2D arrays, automated systems, sensors, actuators, and ethical implications of AI.

title: Networks & Infrastructure
description: LAN, WAN, network topologies, hardware, protocols, packet switching, and routing.

title: Cybersecurity
description: Threats including malware and social engineering, and protective measures such as firewalls, encryption, and MFA.

title: Algorithms
description: Pseudocode, flowcharts, searching, sorting algorithms, validation, and algorithm design principles.

title: Software
description: Programming principles, high/low-level languages, compilation, interpreters, SDLC, and programming errors.

title: Logical Operations
description: Boolean logic gates (AND, OR, NOT, XOR), truth tables, and their application in digital circuits.

title: Operating Systems
description: Purpose of an OS, resource management (CPU, memory, peripherals), utility software, and user interfaces.

title: Systems Development Life Cycle
description: SDLC phases, development models (waterfall, agile, iterative, spiral), and professional/ethical considerations.
